name: Turkish Airlines

carryOn.notes: Business class: 2 carry-on bags (8 kg each). Economy: 1 bag up to 8 kg.

batteryRules.lithiumIon: Carry-on only for spare lithium batteries
batteryRules.spareBatteries: Max 100Wh per battery. 101–160Wh requires airline approval.

restrictedItems: Smart bags with non-removable lithium batteries

faqs.question: Does Turkish Airlines include free checked bags?
faqs.answer: Yes, Turkish Airlines includes at least one checked bag on all international flights. Domestic flights within Turkey may have different allowances by fare class.

faqs.question: What is the carry-on weight limit on Turkish Airlines?
faqs.answer: Economy class: 8 kg total carry-on weight. Business class: 2 bags, 8 kg each.
